recommendations.title: Heavy Trip

recommendations.title: Iron Maiden: Flight 666
recommendations.overview: Heavy metal band Iron Maiden's 2008 Somewhere Back in Time World Tour. This concert recording accompanies the documentary film "Iron Maiden: Flight 666". The 16 songs performed were filmed live in 16 different cities giving you the full experience of

recommendations.title: Metalhead
recommendations.overview: A young girl in 1990s Iceland is caught between the life that took her brother and her own inability to strike out on her own. In her grief, she finds solace in metal and dreams of making her own music.

recommendations.title: Metal Lords
recommendations.overview: For teenage misfits Hunter and Kevin, the path to glory is clear: Devote themselves to metal. Win Battle of the Bands. And be worshipped like gods.

recommendations.title: Until the Light Takes Us
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the history, ideology and aesthetic of Norwegian black metal, a musical subculture infamous as much for a series of murders and church arsons as it is for its unique musical and visual aesthetics. This is the first film to truly shed light

recommendations.title: Pop Redemption
recommendations.overview: A black metal band it is about to split up. In their way to one last gig at Hellfest festival an accidental death triggers numerous misadventures to four metalheads.

recommendations.title: Lords of Chaos
recommendations.overview: A teenager's quest to launch Norwegian Black Metal in Oslo in the 1990s results in a very violent outcome.

recommendations.title: Rock Star

recommendations.title: Sound of Metal

recommendations.title: Metallica: Some Kind of Monster
